statement.p: Overall, the median rent for a one-bedroom apartment in a city rose by {2.7\%} over the previous year. Jovan was fortunate in that his rent did not raise by that high of a percentage. It went from last years amount to {\$1{,}620}\text{.} Set up an inequality where the solution set represents what his rent could might have been last year. There is no need to solve it.
